data.title: Grayscale Transfers Significant Bitcoin Holdings Amid Market Movements
data.description: According to PANews, on April 2, blockchain data revealed that Grayscale's Bitcoin Trust address (1DPZZ) transferred a total of 658.77 bitcoins to two separate addresses at 21:08 UTC+8. The transaction is valued at approximately $56 million based on current market prices.

data.title: Grayscale Launches Premium Income ETF Balancing Bitcoin Growth and Income
data.description: According to Odaily, Grayscale has announced the launch of the Grayscale Premium Income ETF (BPI). This ETF is designed to balance the growth potential of Bitcoin with income generation, offering investors monthly dividend distributions.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 600 USDT with a 2.30% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 02, 2025, 13:13 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 600 USDT and is now trading at 599.780029 USDT, with a narrowed 2.30% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: First Round of $100M CEX Liquidity Incentive Announced: KILO, MUBARAK, BROCCOLI714, TUT, and BANANAS31 Secure Up to $2.3M in Support
data.description: BNB Chain has unveiled the first batch of recipients for its highly anticipated $100M Centralized Exchange (CEX) Liquidity Incentive Program, launched on March 24, 2025. Following a rigorous review process, five projects have been selected to receive up to $2.3 million in liquidity support rewards for their recent listings on top-tier centralized exchanges.Eligible Projects and Liquidity AwardsTokenCEX ListingsListing DateTotal Liquidity SupportKiloEx (KILO)Bybit, Bitget, MEXC, Gate.io, KuCoin2025.03.27Up to $290,000Mubarak (MUBARAK)Binance2025.03.27Up to $500,000CZ’s Dog (BROCCOLI714)Binance2025.03.27Up to $500,000Tutorial (TUT)Binance2025.03.27Up to $500,000Banana For Scale (BANANAS31)Binance, Bitget2025.03.26–27Up to $510,000Total Support Allocated in Phase One: Up to $2.3 MillionKey Program RulesOnly newly listed tokens on CEXs after March 24 are eligible for liquidity support.Liquidity rewards are not one-time: listed projects can continue earning support through additional exchange listings.Reward distributions will begin this week, with progress updates to be shared via BNB Chain’s official X account.

data.title: ACT fell below 0.055 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 44.35%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OKX market data shows that ACT fell below 0.055 USDT and is currently trading at 0.0532 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 44.35%.

data.title: Usual launches $16 million bug bounty program
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Usual announced that it will jointly launch a $16 million vulnerability bounty program with SHERLOCK and Nexus Mutual, which will reward people who discover critical vulnerabilities in its code base. Usual revealed that it has completed more than 20 audits and that the program will strengthen its commitment to establishing security standards in DeFi.

data.title: Alabama Approves Bill for Cryptocurrency Investments
data.description: According to Odaily, the state of Alabama has passed legislation permitting its investment committee to allocate funds to Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. This development follows previous statements by Alabama Senator Tommy Tuberville, who announced plans to reintroduce the Financial Freedom Act on April 1. The proposed legislation aims to allow U.S. citizens to include cryptocurrencies in their 401(k) retirement savings plans. This marks Tuberville's third attempt to advance the bill, following efforts in 2022 and 2023.

data.title: Alabama passes bill allowing state investment committee to allocate funds to BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Alabama has passed a bill allowing the state investment committee to allocate funds to BTC and cryptocurrencies. (Cointelegraph) Earlier, U.S. Alabama Senator Tommy Tuberville said that he plans to submit the Financial Freedom Act again on April 1, allowing Americans to include cryptocurrencies in their 401(k) retirement savings plans. This is his third attempt to push the bill through after 2022 and 2023.

data.title: Gitcoin announces the official launch of GG23, donations open until April 16
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Gitcoin announced that GG23 is officially launched, and donations will be open until April 16. The OSS program is the core of Gitcoin Grants, which is currently provided through QF and Retro Funding, with a matching amount of $600,000. It will allocate $600,000 to 30 mature GG OSS projects that have already produced measurable impacts to reward builders who help Ethereum grow.

data.title: The open interest of $80,000 Bitcoin put options on Deribit has reached 10,278 contracts, worth over $860 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News data shows that the open interest of $80,000 Bitcoin put options on Deribit has reached 10,278 contracts, worth approximately $864.26 million. Analysts believe that traders are seeking downside protection amid economic uncertainty and potential trade tensions. Later on Wednesday in the United States, Trump is expected to announce comprehensive tariffs on its trading partners, which could lead to a full-scale trade war and also have Bitcoin traders chasing downside protection. (CoinDesk)
